creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233795
[NEW PORT] cad/librnd: Flexible, modular two-dimensional CAD engine

librnd is a free/open source, flexible, modular two-dimensional CAD engine

 - with transparent multiple GUI toolkit support,
 - flexible, dynamic menu system
 - flexible, dynamic configuration system
 - support for user scripting in a dozen languages

WWW: http://www.repo.hu/projects/librnd/

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 i386 amd64 FreeBSD 13.
Portlint and portclippy like the port.
The test suite passes.
The GTK2GL and GTK4 frontends currently do not build on armv7 due to bug #263845.
The new port devel/fungw from bug #263819 must be added before this port can be built.

This port is part of a larger effort to port the Ringdove EDA suite.
